# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Novyx Vault, please report it responsibly.

**Email:** blake@novyxlabs.com

Please include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and aim to release a fix within 7 days for critical issues.

**Do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

## Scope

This policy covers:
- The Novyx Vault application (this repository)
- The hosted instance at vault.novyxlabs.com

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.3.x   | Yes       |
| < 0.3   | No        |
